data.name: 蕾貝卡與詛咒之劍
data.detailed_description:
✤故事✤

女戰士蕾貝卡是這座邊境小村內最強的戰士。

蕾貝卡不只劍術強大，心地也十分善良，在村裡擔當著類似村莊守護者的角色，深受村民們信賴。

但某天，蕾貝卡的村莊被盜賊團襲擊了。蕾貝卡雖然勇敢應戰，但村民們還是幾乎都被擄走了。

她的單相思對象竹藏也不例外。於是蕾貝卡踏上了旅程，誓言一定要打倒盜賊團，拯救村民們。

在嶄新的大陸上，蕾貝卡獲得了魔劍。而這把魔劍將會大幅改變她的命運……！？

當盜賊團被打倒，蕾貝卡成功奪回心上人的那一刻，村裡最強的女戰士究竟會迎來怎樣的結局？

✤遊戲内容✤

▲將港口城鎮作為據點前往攻略各個地圖吧！根據攻略進度，能夠前往的地方也會變多。
 

▲可以跟各式各樣的敵人戰鬥，賺取經驗值後可以提升等級。
 

▲地圖上會掉落各式各樣的素材，可以將這些素材拿去換錢。

data.supported_languages: 日文, 英文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10/11
  • 處理器: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10/11
  • 處理器: 2+ GHz Processor
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL ES 2.0 hardware driver support required for WebGL acceleration. (AMD Catalyst 10.9, nVidia 358.50)
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間

data.name: Rebecca and the Sword of Nasty Curses
data.detailed_description:
✤Story✤

The female warrior Rebecca is the strongest warrior in this small border village.

Rebecca is not only powerful with swordsmanship but also very kind-hearted.

She plays a role similar to the village guardian and is deeply trusted by the villagers.

One day, Rebecca's village was attacked by a group of bandits.

Almost all the villagers were kidnapped, including Takezo, the person of her unrequited love.

So Rebecca embarked on a journey, vowing to defeat the bandits and save the villagers.

In a new continent, Rebecca obtained the magic sword "Cursed Sword".

And this magic sword will greatly change her destiny...!?

When the bandits are defeated and Rebecca successfully takes back her sweetheart, what will happen to the strongest female warrior in the village?

✤Game Content✤

▲Use the port town as your base and conquer each map!

According to the progress, there will be more places to go to.
 

▲You can fight a variety of enemies and gain experience points to level up.
 

▲Various materials will drop on the map, and these materials can be exchanged for money.

data.short_description: One day, Rebecca's village is attacked by a group of thieves. And most of the villagers are taken, including her crush, Takezo. Swearing to defeat the thieves, Rebecca sets out on a journey. What fate awaits the village's strongest female warrior when she rescues her beloved?
data.supported_languages: Japanese, English, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10/11
  • Processor: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • Graphics: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • OS *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10/11
  • Processor: 2+ GHz Processor
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: OpenGL ES 2.0 hardware driver support required for WebGL acceleration. (AMD Catalyst 10.9, nVidia 358.50)
  • Storage: 4 GB available space
